summary: Auth routes refactoring test complete. All 23 backend tests pass. The new /api/auth/* routes are properly registered and working. Original routes in server.py are correctly disabled with /_disabled_auth/ prefix.
critical_code_review_comments: Helpers (hash_password, verify_password, etc.) are properly injected via set_helpers()
Database reference properly set via set_db()
All routes use /api/auth prefix correctly via router prefix
MongoDB _id is properly excluded from queries or handled by Pydantic model with extra='ignore'
Original server.py routes are renamed to /_disabled_auth/* to avoid conflicts
seed_data_creation: Created new test user during registration test
